_doc: Crypto heartbeat config v1.1. Mirror of futures/options params pattern. Single source of truth. Updated 2026-06-16 from overnight research: ATR multipliers raised for BTC wicks, RSI widened (BTC hits 78-85 in valid trends), h1 trend filter added.
_signal_section: EMA ribbon (9/21/50). min_stack_bars=2 is most important filter — do not lower. RSI thresholds widened from 72/28: BTC regularly hits 78-85 during the strongest ribbon signals.
_h1_filter_section: Higher timeframe trend filter (2026-06-16 research). Take 15m LONG only when 1h EMA-9 > EMA-50; SHORT only when 1h EMA-9 < EMA-50. Requires one extra Alpaca API call (get_crypto_bars 1h). This is the correct fix for chop during thin hours — NOT switching to 1h timeframe.
_stop_section: ATR-based stops. Raised from 1.5/2.0/3.0 — BTC 15m wicks spike 0.8-1.2x ATR inside valid trends, causing false stops. Ratio preserved: 1:1.5:2.25 (stop:TP1:runner). TP1 R:R=1.5R, runner R:R=2.25R.
_risk_section: Per-trade risk 2%, daily kill switch -10%, single position cap 25%.
_logging_section: Log session metadata with each would-be trade for future regime analysis (WR varies by hour-of-day + day-of-week).
_status_section: WATCH-ONLY until 20+ trades with WR >= 45% and positive expectancy. ETH/USD: add watch-only AFTER BTC clears 20-trade gate. Separate state dir automation/state/crypto_eth/ when ready.
status: WATCH-ONLY — paper mode, ratify after 20+ trades WR>=45%
version_notes: v1.1 2026-06-16: ATR 1.5/2.0/3.0 → 2.0/3.0/4.5 (BTC wick resistance), RSI 72/28 → 80/20 (BTC momentum range), h1_trend_filter=true, log_session_metadata=true
